desc: Command: Extends a selected pipe upwards to the next primary level.
summary: Command: Extends a selected pipe upwards to the next primary level. INCLUDES LEVELS FROM LINKED MODELS (architectural links, etc.) WORKFLOW: 1. User selects a pipe endpoint 2. Command uses ListLevels.GetPrimaryLevels() to find level structure (host + linked models) 3. Determines current pipe position and next level above 4. Creates extension pipe to next primary level + 150mm offset 5. Matches all properties from source pipe 6. Optionally creates bend fitting at connection
usecase: User needs to extend an SVP or drainage riser to the next floor. User wants to grow vertical stacks through floor plates. User is extending vent pipes through ceiling/floor assemblies.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one pipe must exist in the model. At least two primary levels must exist (current and target). User must select a valid pipe element.
postcondition: A new pipe is created extending from the selected pipe to the next primary level. Extension terminates at level elevation + 150mm offset. New pipe matches system, size and family routing types. Bend fitting created at connection point (optional).
sideeffects: Creates a new pipe element in the model. May create a bend fitting element.
logictree: check: document.isOpen → continueaction: promptUserToSelectPipe → getSelectedPipecheck: selectedElement.isPipe → continue, else → erroraction: getPrimaryLevels → ListLevels.GetPrimaryLevelscheck: primaryLevels.count >= 2 → continue, else → error (need at least current + target)action: findCurrentLevel → LevelResolver.GetNearestLevelaction: findNextLevelAbove → compare elevationscheck: nextLevel.exists → continue, else → error (already at top)action: calculateExtensionLength → targetLevel.elevation + offset - currentZaction: createExtensionPipe → ExtendPipeToNextLevel.Extendresolve: success → showSuccess, else → showError

selection_inputs.name: Pipe
selection_inputs.description: Pipe to extend to next level
selection_inputs.prompt: Select a pipe to extend to the next level

config_inputs.name: LevelOffset
config_inputs.description: Offset above level elevation in mm

config_inputs.name: CreateBend
config_inputs.description: Whether to create bend fitting at connection
